name: Dunnavant Valley AA
notes:
“Our book is meant to be suggestive only. We realize we know only a little.”

A meeting focused on open-mindedness, humility, and shared experience. We gather to support one another on the journey of recovery, remembering that none of us have all the answers. All are welcome.
